requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — GB/T 20234 vs IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234与IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234與IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2

summary.en: Madagascar's BNM (Bureau des Normes de Madagascar) adopts IEC standards for technical conformity, and Madagascar's Francophone and IEC-aligned regulatory environment means that EV charging connector requirements follow the IEC 62196 ecosystem. AC charging uses the IEC 62196-2 Type 2 (Mennekes) coupler, and DC fast charging uses the Combined Charging System Combo 2 (CCS2), defined in IEC 62196-3 configuration FF. This IEC 62196 alignment is consistent with the Francophone African market's adoption of European IEC-based connector standards. Any EV charger deployed in Madagascar for public or commercial use must use IEC 62196-compatible connectors to be interoperable with IEC-standard EV vehicle inlets that are the basis of the emerging African EV market.
summary.zh: 马达加斯加BNM（马达加斯加标准局）采用IEC标准进行技术合格评定，马达加斯加法语区及IEC体系的监管环境意味着电动汽车充电接口要求遵循IEC 62196体系。交流充电使用IEC 62196-2 Type 2（Mennekes）耦合器，直流快充使用IEC 62196-3 FF配置定义的联合充电系统Combo 2（CCS2）。这种IEC 62196体系与法语非洲市场采用欧洲IEC体系接口标准一致。在马达加斯加用于公共或商业用途的任何电动汽车充电桩，须使用IEC 62196兼容接口，以与新兴非洲电动汽车市场所依托的IEC标准车辆接口互操作。
summary.zht: 馬達加斯加BNM（馬達加斯加標準局）採用IEC標準進行技術合格評定，馬達加斯加法語區及IEC體系的監管環境意味著電動汽車充電接口要求遵循IEC 62196體系。交流充電使用IEC 62196-2 Type 2（Mennekes）耦合器，直流快充使用IEC 62196-3 FF配置定義的聯合充電系統Combo 2（CCS2）。這種IEC 62196體系與法語非洲市場採用歐洲IEC體系接口標準一致。在馬達加斯加用於公共或商業用途的任何電動汽車充電樁，須使用IEC 62196兼容接口，以與新興非洲電動汽車市場所依托的IEC標準車輛接口互操作。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-2 — Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for a.c. pin and contact-tube accessories
IEC 62196-3 — Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for DC and AC/DC pin and contact-tube vehicle couplers
IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment
BNM (Bureau des Normes de Madagascar) — IEC standard adoption framework

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers. Although the GB/T 20234.2 AC coupler has a similar overall shape to the IEC 62196 Type 2, they differ in connector gender (GB/T uses male connector at the charger and female vehicle inlet, opposite to Type 2), signaling protocol (CC/CP versus PP/CP), and contact arrangement, making them physically and electrically incompatible. GB/T 20234.3 DC couplers are geometrically different from CCS2 and use a nine-pin configuration with CAN bus via GB/T 27930 communication, incompatible with the CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 communication stack. No GB/T connector variant is plug-compatible with IEC 62196 vehicle inlets.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。尽管GB/T 20234.2交流耦合器外形与IEC 62196 Type 2相近，但两者在接口性别（GB/T充电桩端为公口、车辆端为母口，与Type 2相反）、信号协议（CC/CP与PP/CP）及触点排列上均不同，在物理和电气层面互不兼容。GB/T 20234.3直流耦合器与CCS2几何形状不同，采用九针配置并通过GB/T 27930 CAN总线通信，与CCS2 / IEC 61851-24通信栈不兼容。任何GB/T接口变体均无法与IEC 62196车辆接口直接插接。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。儘管GB/T 20234.2交流耦合器外形與IEC 62196 Type 2相近，但兩者在接口性別（GB/T充電樁端為公口、車輛端為母口，與Type 2相反）、信號協議（CC/CP與PP/CP）及觸點排列上均不同，在物理和電氣層面互不兼容。GB/T 20234.3直流耦合器與CCS2幾何形狀不同，採用九針配置並通過GB/T 27930 CAN總線通訊，與CCS2 / IEC 61851-24通訊棧不兼容。任何GB/T接口變體均無法與IEC 62196車輛接口直接插接。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20234.2-2015 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 2: AC charging coupler
GB/T 20234.3-2023 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 3: DC charging coupler
GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system for electric vehicles
GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: A China GB/T-only charger is not connector-ready for Type 2 / CCS2 Madagascar deployments. Conversion requires hardware redesign of the coupler, cable assembly, locking mechanism, proximity pilot and control pilot signaling, DC communication stack (from GB/T 27930 CAN to IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 where required for CCS2), labels, test reports, temperature-rise evidence, and spare-part strategy. Adapters are not an accepted substitute for project-compliant connector design. Exporters must confirm that the Madagascar project, ORE, JIRAMA, or specific site specification requires IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC and CCS2 for DC before finalising product design.
gap.zh: 仅支持中国GB/T接口的充电桩不适用于马达加斯加Type 2 / CCS2部署。转换需要对耦合器、电缆组件、锁止机构、接近导引和控制导引信号、直流通信栈（CCS2时须从GB/T 27930 CAN转换为IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118）、标签、测试报告、温升证据及备件策略进行硬件重新设计。转接器不是项目合规接口设计的替代方案。出口商在确定产品设计前，须确认马达加斯加项目、ORE、JIRAMA或具体场地规范是否要求交流采用IEC 62196 Type 2、直流采用CCS2。
gap.zht: 僅支持中國GB/T接口的充電樁不適用於馬達加斯加Type 2 / CCS2部署。轉換需要對耦合器、電纜組件、鎖止機構、接近導引和控制導引信號、直流通訊棧（CCS2時須從GB/T 27930 CAN轉換為IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118）、標籤、測試報告、溫升證據及備件策略進行硬體重新設計。轉接器不是項目合規接口設計的替代方案。出口商在確定產品設計前，須確認馬達加斯加項目、ORE、JIRAMA或具體場地規範是否要求交流採用IEC 62196 Type 2、直流採用CCS2。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 is required by BNM-adopted IEC standards, ORE, project specification, or site-owner requirements; physical incompatibility with GB/T makes substitution impossible without hardware redesign
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not an IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Connector conversion is a hardware and protocol redesign, not a paperwork exercise. Madagascar's IEC/Francophone alignment means GB/T connectors are not interoperable with vehicle inlets in the target market. Confirm IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC and CCS2 for DC before designing, quoting, or shipping any charger unit for Madagascar.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 接口转换是硬件和协议重新设计，而非文件替换。马达加斯加的IEC/法语区体系意味着GB/T接口与目标市场的车辆接口不兼容。在为马达加斯加设计、报价或发货任何充电桩之前，须确认交流采用IEC 62196 Type 2、直流采用CCS2。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 接口轉換是硬體和協議重新設計，而非文件替換。馬達加斯加的IEC/法語區體系意味著GB/T接口與目標市場的車輛接口不兼容。在為馬達加斯加設計、報價或發貨任何充電樁之前，須確認交流採用IEC 62196 Type 2、直流採用CCS2。
